steps.title: Discriminant shortcut: no real solutions means $b^2 - 4ac < 0$
steps.content:
$$(-56)^2-4(k)(16)<0$$
$$3136-64k<0$$
$$k>49$$ Desmos can find the boundary value by setting the discriminant equal to $0$.

steps.title: Pick the least integer
steps.content: $k$ must be an integer greater than $49$, so the least value is $k=50$. That matches choice 50, so 50 is correct.
